message: Or anyone outside ethics investigation to publish. That rule keeps records private and prevents ethics board personnel from disclosing

video_title: The Masks Have Slipped.  #LeahRemini #MikeRinder #Scientology
author: Carrie J
message: Confidentiality protects lawyer until certain stage in process, and keeps baseless allegations from harming reputation. Once certain process reached or allegations proven, then becomes public
